author: y4rr
content: Plan: Write 6 PTX kernels for SiLU/ELU/Mish forward+backward. These are simple elementwise (no shared-memory reduction needed). Formulas: SiLU fwd: x*sigmoid(x), bwd: g*(sig+x*sig*(1-sig)); ELU fwd: x>0?x:alpha*(exp(x)-1), bwd: x>0?g:g*alpha*exp(x); Mish fwd: x*tanh(ln(1+exp(x))), bwd: g*(tanh(sp)+x*sig*(1-tanh(sp)^2)). Also doing #476 LogSoftmax (needs row-reduction kernel like softmax) and #477 (backward kernels for all).
